accuracy_note: v1/v2 judged on trial 1 only (both Fable+Grok agreed); v3 exec-scored across all 5 trials.
findings: Enforcing one-shot did not change the WINNER direction vs tools-enabled: v1 easy -> 4.6, v2 hard -> 4.8, v3 -> tie. Absolute review scores dropped (no verification), e.g. v1 10/9 -> 8/7.
Accuracy pattern is coherent on REVIEW tasks: 4.6 better on easy, 4.8 better on hard. Command-gen tied at ceiling.

Latency is task-TYPE dependent, not cleanly difficulty-dependent: 4.8 faster on both review tasks (v1 25s vs 47s; v2 174s vs 224s) but 4.6 faster on commands (v3 18s vs 22s). No stable 'faster model'.
Cost per full question-set (median): v1 ~$0.07-0.08, v2 ~$0.30-0.39, v3 ~$0.04-0.05; 4.8 slightly pricier except v3.
